conflict: The tribunal can freeze a factory but still refuse personhood, and CommonFrame's lawyers will reduce Lin to faulty inventory unless the testimony becomes undeniable.
consequence: Overlap bodies enter the public record as deliberate creations with living claims on them, even though the law stops short of recognizing full personhood.
must_land_beats: Use Celia's late defection to complicate rather than absolve her.
Make registry evidence and testimony work together instead of one replacing the other.
Let Lin's testimony be embodied and specific, not sloganized.
End with a partial institutional victory that creates new problems.
pressure_source: The tribunal can freeze a factory but still refuse personhood, and CommonFrame's lawyers will reduce Lin to faulty inventory unless the testimony becomes undeniable.
state_shift: Overlap bodies enter the public record as deliberate creations with living claims on them, even though the law stops short of recognizing full personhood.
